# Embedded PQC (embedpqc) ML-DSA Implementation

This directory contains an embedded-friendly software implementation of ML-DSA to provide PQC support on Earlgrey v1 where the PQC OTBN hardware support is unavailable.

## Security Notice

> [!WARNING]
> **Not Hardened Against Physical Attacks**
>
> This cryptographic implementation is not hardened against Side-Channel Analysis (SCA) or Fault Injection (FI) attacks.
